THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK UNITED OF TEXAS, FSB FKA UNITED SAVINGS ASSOCIATION OF TEXAS, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YABUT, NORA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 37 RUTH ST SF CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, DAMAGES AND CLAIMS WAIVED. EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YABUT, NORA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT YABUT, NORA
